history.content:
<thought>
I am at row 02 column B facing right. The cell directly ahead at row 02 column C is lava, so I must not move forward. The goal is at row 04 column D, and the safe route is to go down first. From facing right, turning right will make me face down.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 02 column B facing down. The cell directly ahead at row 03 column B is safe floor, and moving there brings me closer to the goal while avoiding lava.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 03 column B facing down. The cell directly ahead at row 04 column B is safe floor, so moving forward is the best next step toward the goal at row 04 column D.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 04 column B facing down, but the cell directly ahead is a wall boundary at row 05, column B, so I cannot move forward. To reach the goal at row 04 column D, I should turn right to face toward the open path.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 04 column B facing left. The cell ahead to the left is a wall, so moving forward is blocked. To head toward the goal at row 04 column D, I need to turn around and face right.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 04 column B facing up. The cell in front is row 03 column B, which is safe floor. Moving forward also keeps me on a path toward the goal at row 04 column D while avoiding the lava at row 04 column C.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am now at row 03 column B facing up. The goal is at row 04 column D, so I need to move toward the right side of the map. Since I am facing up, I should turn right to face east before advancing.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 03 column B facing right. The cell ahead at row 03 column C is safe floor, and moving forward brings me closer to the goal at row 04 column D while still avoiding lava.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 03 column C facing right. The cell ahead at row 03 column D is safe, and moving there sets me up to reach the goal at row 04 column D on the next step.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 03 column D facing right, and the cell ahead is a wall, so I cannot move forward. The goal is directly below me at row 04 column D, so I need to face down first.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 03 column D facing down, and the goal is directly ahead at row 04 column D. The cell is safe and will reach the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>
